hooks.command: bash -c 'cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)" && if command -v graphify >/dev/null 2>&1; then graphify . --update --quiet 2>/dev/null && NODES=$(python3 -c "import json,sys; g=json.load(open(\"graph.json\")); print(len(g.get(\"nodes\",[])))" 2>/dev/null || echo \"?\") && echo "[graphify] graph ready — ${NODES} nodes. Query with: graphify query \"your question\" (saves ~30x tokens vs file reads)"; else echo "[graphify] not installed — run: pip install graphifyy && graphify install && graphify ."; fi'
